benefits.description: Body recomposition possible at higher body fats; able to gain 10lbs muscle while cutting from 285 to 225 lbs
10lbs of muscle gained during cut phase (mostly early in cut, not at tail end)

side_effects.description: Fasting blood glucose (FBG) elevates with retatrutide due to glucagon activity

protocol_notes: Has run both reta and tirz paired with HGH. Reports tirz + GH superior combo with caloric deficit. Retatrutide not superior when paired with GH analogues/HGH due to glucagon liberating glucose (undesirable with GH). States reta hype driven by influencers. Suggests reta may be better as first GLP or during bulk when actively eating. Has not seen anyone benefit from switching from tirz to reta for weight loss; clients end up stacking additional tirz. Recommends hormone panel before taking clients.
